steps.title: Explain the career shift
steps.content: The passage says Barragán's career evolved through distinct phases. The underlined portion gives the cause of the later phase: travel abroad sparked his engagement with modernist and functionalist aesthetics.

steps.title: Reject wrong functions
steps.content: Choice B says both projects were departures from his typical style, which the passage does not claim. Choice C points back to Mediterranean design, but the underlined portion explains the later modernist shift. Choice D invents information about contemporary reception. The answer is A.
